evals.prompt: I need validate fingerprint for SHA-256 fingerprint 9A:7B:11:22:33:44:55:66:77:88:99:AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF:00:12:34:56:78:9A:BC:DE:F0:11:22:33:44:55:66.
evals.expected_output: Use the fingerprint-validator skill for this fingerprint validator request and produce the documented result for SHA-256 fingerprint 9A:7B:11:22:33:44:55:66:77:88:99:AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF:00:12:34:56:78:9A:BC:DE:F0:11:22:33:44:55:66.
expectations: Selects fingerprint-validator for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_validate_fingerprint.
Keeps the response focused on validating certificate fingerprint format correctness for SHA-256, SHA-1, or MD5.

evals.expected_output: Use the fingerprint-validator skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects fingerprint-validator instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
